programme.desc: Crooler has lost faith in Cragger. With the aid of the Wolves, she causes chaos at the Speedor races and tries to steal all the Chi from the Lion Temple. The mysterious Speedor rider ShadoWind shows up again — but whose side is he on?

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen Chi. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of Chima have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof” way to get Chi to the tribes.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Wolves are still stealing Chi, and everyone else has very little. When a load of CHI falls into the Gorge of Eternal Depth, Laval, Eris and Gorzan must try to retrieve it.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles taken prisoners by the Wolves. Laval determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris, and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue.… but something about ShadoWind isn’t quite right.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger has been freed and wants to give out CHI to all tribes of Chima, but he has none. He employs a strange Raven alchemist to produce some fake CHI. But the fake CHI has some very unexpected side effects, and the alchemist has an agenda of his own.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: In the season finale, all the players have finally come together, and it's time to see how the tale ends.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of some quick gunplay by his partner Jigen, Lupin takes on the world in elaborate heists, classic car chases, and nasty explosions. Fujiko, a buxom redhead with a penchant for betrayal, always gets tangled up in Lupin's capers.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: One rainy afternoon, a man seeks Lupin's help on behalf of a young woman. The woman is actually Fujiko, who is after a diamond known as "The Star of Killamanjaro". The diamond was implanted into the chest of a mob boss.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Three scrolls contain the secret of creating a blade like the Zantetsuken. Lupin wants to steal them as a matter of family pride because his grandfather, Arsene Lupin, stole them back in the 19th century.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Napoleon once owned a deck of fortune-telling cards that are now in the hands of a millionaire known as Mr. Gold. Lupin plans to steal them during Mr. Gold's birthday party, and Zenigata plans to stop him. Lupin succeeds in stealing the mysterious cards.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang aim to steal the blueprints for a new computer. In their way is a man skilled with the machinegun and his hit-man partner named Poon, who used to be Fujiko's partner in the past.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is posing as Lupin and blowing up bridges, causing a lot of damage and injuries. Lupin and Jigen discover that the bomber is trying to force an armored car to travel along a route of his choosing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Baron Ukraine are both after the world's most skilled counterfeiter. Lupin would have no problem beating the Baron, but the Baron has hired a man called Flinch along with Fujiko and gave them instructions to kill Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Mamo Kyosuke claims that Lupin will disappear from the world in four days. He claims that he is a time traveler from 2874 seeking revenge. Apparently, Lupin XIII destroyed the Mamo clan on March 2874.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are both after the legendary Eye of the Nile emerald. It is going to be a wedding gift presented at a wedding being held on a yacht.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Zenigata has been invited to an international police convention in Europe; his chief wants him to go, but Zenigata does not want to since Lupin has declared that he will steal a gold bust within the next three days.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko goads Lupin into stealing a large shipment of diamonds. Lupin takes the task despite Jigen's protest that Fujiko is playing them for fools. Of course, Jigen is right.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko invites Lupin and the gang to a famous nightclub owned by the sexy Hoshikage Rinko. Only Goemon refuses. This was a wise move as Rinko places timebombs on Fujiko, Jigen, and Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Smith is an art thief that is selling stolen paintings under the guise of a beauty contest. Lupin decides he wants in on the action as well, promising to steal away the treasured paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Inspector Ganimard III is the grandson of Lupin I's archnemesis. He has come to Japan as the head of security for the 1972 France Fair but also intends to restore his family's honor by arresting Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is committing thefts under Lupin's name. Lupin follows the imposters back to their island hideout. He has apparently stumbled into a whole island of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Gordon, an FBI computer specialist, is in Japan to operate a computer capable of predicting crimes and determining how to stop them. The Metropolitan Police Department hopes that this will finally help them capture Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A disputed horde of recently discovered ancient gold coins draws the attention of Lupin and company. As the ownership of the coins is disputed, Lupin decides to settle the matter on his own by stealing them from the Dai Nippon Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Bye Bye, Lady Liberty
programme.desc: Foiled repeatedly by the predictions of Interpol's supercomputer, professional looter Lupin III has settled down. A sinister secret organization and a young computer genius are thrown into the mix. And whose side is the buxom Fujiko on this time?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Hemingway Papers
programme.desc: The legendary last manuscript of the great Ernest Hemingway tells of a buried treasure on an island far away… and thief extraordinaire Lupin is on the trail! But he gets caught up in a local civil war, Lupin will have to keep his wits or risk his life!

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/09/22: Josh Naylor finds his stride late in the game as he gets an RBI double in the top of the 8th inning, hits a grand slam in the top of the 9th inning to tie the game, and then finally hits the go-ahead home run.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/15/22: Hunter Greene pitches 7 and 1/3 innings without a single hit, but a crucial RBI forceout for the Pirates by Ke'Bryan Hayes in the bottom of the 8th inning gives the Pirates their one and only run leading them to an unusual 1-0 win over the Reds.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/24/22: The Mets and Giants engage in an epic back-and-forth battle for the ages, however the Mets' seven run 8th inning is not enough to keep the Giants away from the win, with Brandon Crawford walking it off with an RBI single in the 9th inning.

programme.title: This Week in Baseball
programme.desc: On this edition of This Week in Baseball, take a dive into the careers of Ken Griffey Jr. and Mark McGuire, the shortstop positions around the league are loaded with talent, a Beanie Babies giveaway, and Rex Hudler's infectious energy.

programme.title: World Series Films
programme.desc: This World Series Film showcases the 1958 matchup between the Yankees and the Braves. A rematch of the 1957 World Series, Milwaukee took a 3-1 series lead into Game 5 before the Yankees came roaring back to secure their 7th World Series title in 10 years.

programme.title: Prime 9
programme.desc: Prime 9 lists the top nine greatest LCS games.

programme.title: MLB Ultimate Lineup
programme.desc: Check out The Most Memorable Tirades We Ever Saw! From managers to players, these baseball greats lost their cool on the diamond.

programme.title: Fenway Park 100 Years
programme.desc: Fenway Park first opened on April 20, 1912 and since then has been known for its unique features and historic moments. Current and former Red Sox players share their experiences playing in one of baseball's greatest ballparks.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 8/21/22: Mark Canha belts a three-run homer in the 7th inning to tie the game, then slugs a two-run go-ahead big fly in the top of the 9th to help the Mets rally for a 10-9 win over the Phillies.

programme.title: MST3K: Pod People
programme.desc: A child adopts a large egg which hatches into a mischievous alien, while a group of pop musicians on a wilderness vacation runs into trouble.

programme.title: MST3K: The Day The Earth Froze

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Matlock takes on the defense of Nguyen Tran, a Vietnamese fisherman accused of murdering the town bully, a man who had been terrorizing Tran and his fellow countrymen.

programme.desc: Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.desc: George Maharis guest stars as John Bachman, an underworld figure with access to the syndicate's top secret computerized records who is convinced by the IMF that he has found the fountain of youth.

programme.desc: William Windom guest stars as Paul Mitchell, a boxing promoter tied to a crime syndicate who becomes a target of the IMF when one of his fighters is killed before he can talk to the police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: Guest star Fernando Lamas portrays a diplomat-playboy who romances another diplomat's wife, played by Lee Grant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows viewers a kitten named Jimmy and a film of Jimmy's birth, and assures viewers that "it's all right to wonder about things." Then, poet and essayist May Sarton visits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces his television Neighbors to gymnast Chaney Umphrey when he visits at his gym and watches as he exercises. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, mischievous Lady Elaine Fairchilde reveals a mystery!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy factory where people make plastic molded tricycles, and he receives a visit from folk singer Ella Jenkins who collects toy tops from around the world.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers flies a balsa wood airplane, and Mr. McFeely visits an airport control tower. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday discovers that learning to ride a bike isn't always easy!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy lending library and sees children playing with different kinds of toys. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday learns to ride his bike, and also learns to share it!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a raincoat and talks about things to do inside. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Aberlin dances in the rain. X flies to slide down a rainbow. Daniel wants to learn Tai Chi to stop his scary dreams.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine teaches dance and says males weren't invited to the studio because they don't dance.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sam Weber and sees him dance. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday XIII goes to Lady Elaine's dance school, and she turns him away claiming that men can't dance. Sam Weber arrives and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps to weave a scarf. Henrietta Pussycat's ballet teacher, Miss Cloud, does not speak but communicates with movement. The Junior Tamburitzans perform two folk dances. Mister Rogers talks about making up stories and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a dog. Bob Trow stops by with the Bob Dog costume. Prince Tuesday fears that the change will be permanent. Neighbor Aber arrives to explain that the switch is just temporary.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar sees herself in a mirror and realizes that she is very special the way she is. She turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits the circus and sees Jeff Gabel apply his clown make-up.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of the night and day skies. He plays with a star on a string and then remembers his trip to Moscow, where he met Russian children's television program producers. There is a pretend star falling from a string.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets yo-yo expert Tom Parks and shows a film about nighttime workers. Daniel talks with Yo-Yo LaBelle, who is sad because he will have to leave the neighborhood at daybreak.

programme.desc: Mister McFeely delivers the wrong video tape. Mister Rogers reassures Mr. McFeely by singing You Are Special. King Friday is angry and belittles Miss Paulificate when she mistakenly delivers garden hoes instead of garden hose.

programme.desc: Lewis discovers someone called Max Hamilton did research fifty years ago on the strange properties of Mako Island. Lewis tracks the old man down and finds that he knows a lot more about mermaids than Lewis first thought.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Charlotte demands answers to why Lewis is hanging out with the girls so much. She believe an excuse from Cleo, but then a discovery from inside Max's research brings her to the secret! Meanwhile, Ash decides to help Emma with her fear of water.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Charlotte follows Lewis to Max Hamilton. Max tells all to Charlotte when he discovers she’s the granddaughter of his one true love. Charlotte and Lewis almost break up until she goes to the moonpool, becoming a mermaid herself!

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: The girls have to deal with a fourth mermaid who turns out to be a loose cannon; Charlotte almost turns into a mermaid at a volleyball competition. Charlotte discovers she has all three mermaid superpowers.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: As the girls continue to have problems accommodating Charlotte as a mermaid, Nate bullies Lewis. Despite the girls’ attempts to keep Charlotte under control, she uses her powers on Nate and almost exposes them all.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Charlotte takes over and organises a surprise party for Lewis, annoying Rikki. At the party, Charlotte is jealous of Cleo and traps her and Emma in a pool room. Rikki comes back just in time. From now on, Charlotte is on her own.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Cleo is bullied by Charlotte and runs away to the ocean. With Cleo missing, everyone becomes more and more worried. Lewis discovers what Charlotte has been up to and breaks up with her. He finds Cleo and they kiss.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: The full moon rises, and with the planets lining up, it can remove mermaid powers for good. Knowing this, Lewis lures Charlotte to the moon pool but it backfires and Emma, Cleo and Rikki all look set to lose their powers.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Awakening
programme.desc: Cleo and Rikki face their final year of high school without Emma. They make a new friend in Bella and meet new boy Will – and encounter a strange new force on Mako Island that turns water against them.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Jungle Hunt
programme.desc: Will seeks confirmation of his first experience on Mako Island. Bella volunteers to misdirect his search so he won't find the Moon Pool. The girls and Lewis discover the Moon Pool has changed.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Keep Your Enemies Close
programme.desc: Cleo seeks a new job as an assistant dolphin trainer at the Marine Park. Rikki fires Nate's band from playing at the cafe until she and Bella reach an understanding.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Cleo is forced to put Lewis' plans for romance on hold to restrain Kim's out-of-control love life. During this time, Don meets Samantha, a National Parks manager, and they start dating.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Big Ideas
programme.desc: Zane concocts a dirt bike race to publicize the café. When Rikki discovers it's a scam, she and Bella decide to teach him and Nate a lesson. Cleo and Lewis make a major discovery about mixing the waters in the Moon Pool.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Bella attempts to start a relationship with Will until she sees he's apparently got another girl. Lewis tests the magic Moon Pool water at school and attracts the attention of their Science teacher.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Happy Families
programme.desc: A problematic family beach picnic leads Don to end his relationship with Samantha, until Cleo encourages him to pursue it. Will's sister, Sophie, competes with Bella for a job at the café and sets her sights on Zane.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Rikki and Bella hide out at Cleo's to protect themselves from a full moon water attack. However, Bella is kidnapped by a water tentacle and taken to Mako Island. Lewis tries to keep Will away from the island so the girls can rescue her.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Sorcerer's Apprentice
programme.desc: Cleo defies Lewis' advice and experiments with the magic Moon Pool water. Using her powers, Rikki accidentally gets the water into Cleo's aquarium and all the girls have to rescue Cleo's fish Hector.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Revealed
programme.desc: Bella's warned to back off from Will as he's on the trail of the girls' mermaid secrets. She gets too close to him and he finally discovers she's a mermaid.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Just a Girl at Heart
programme.desc: Bella helps Will with his free-diving training but when she realises he's more interested in her as a mermaid than a girl, she's hurt. Rikki and Cleo have to improvise when the cafe's first corporate function is actually a children's party.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Rikki receives counterfeit money at the café and is held captive by criminals on a boat. Bella and Cleo are forced to reveal the trio's secret to Will, so they can rescue Rikki together.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: To Have and to Hold Back
programme.desc: Kim attempts to derail Don and Samantha's wedding. Lewis receives an opportunity to study in America. Cleo realises she's got to let Lewis live his own life and let him go overseas.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Mermaid Magic
programme.desc: Will pushes himself too far when Zane challenges him to prove his skills as a free-diver. The girls discover a unique crystal in the rock from the Moon Pool.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Power Play
programme.desc: Sophie uses Bella's idea for a fundraising concert and presents it as her own to Rikki to gain publicity for the café. Cleo's caught in the crossfire with Kim when Samantha moves in and puts her stamp on the Sertori home.

programme.desc: Brittany has been trying to prove Dionte is the father of her child for 3 years. But Dionte and his mom Monique say they knew Brittany was pregnant! Then, Camara and her best friend Nicole want to confront Chris for denying Camara's baby.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Krista isn't sure if the father of her baby is her husband, her ex-boyfriend or her ex's nephew! Then, Latasha is mad because her sister told her man that she slept with 4 other men, and he may not be the father of her baby!

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.desc: Derrick wants to know whether he is the father of his ex-wife's 3-year-old daughter. Later, Aisia admits to sleeping with two men around the time her second child was conceived, and now her ex wants to know if he is her first child's father.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Solo has a few things he needs to tell his best friend and girlfriend, Vixen. Next Cheryl caught her boyfriend, Nick, in bed with another woman. Later Lonnie's wife, Kim, is having an affair with their 18-year-old friend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Arvonda says her fiance can't satisfy her and treats her badly. She'll tell him that she's been sleeping with his best friend, Mike! Next, Teresa has no idea her boyfriend is having an ongoing affair!

programme.desc: Cindy feels no love at all for her sister, Morgan. She will tell her today that she is stealing Morgan's man for good! Next Emario wants to marry Kathryn, but first she needs to come clean and reveal her secret profession as a prostitute!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beba is here to confront her cousin for stealing her man. Next Tiffany thinks she is going to marry Brian today but there's a catch. Then Billie may have introduced her longtime love, Arkim, to Tiffanie, but today she wants him for herself.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sierra reveals she was born a man. Shon, pregnant by her sister. Anita's boyfriend, sparks chaos.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Determined not to be defeated by the heinous hair of a devious lion, Chopper risks life and limb by summoning the power of his Rumble Ball for a third time!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The madcap throwback continues as Luffy and the gang – along with a crowd of characters from the Alabasta arc – competes for a priceless treasure hidden inside a tasty snack!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami battles a bathing beauty and her lethal bubbles, Chopper unleashes his inner beast, and Luffy inches ever closer to catching up with Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky has a painful encounter with monster Chopper, and Nami gets scrubbed too clean to fight! Meanwhile, Spandam accidentally invokes the deadly Buster Call!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro uses Usopp as a decoy in his battle with the beasts, and Nami discovers the secret that could be the key to survival in her brawl with the bathing beauty!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp’s ill-advised attempt at bravery threatens to get him killed, but a familiar foot spares the sniper’s life. Luffy struggles to even strike a formidable foe, and Franky races to deliver some very important keys!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Our non-heinous heroes Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are in danger of flunking history! But when the righteous Rufus (George Carlin) arrives in a time-traveling phone booth, the dense dudes discover their destiny!

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Bogus Journey
programme.desc: In this sequel to BILL & TED'S EXCELLENT ADVENTURE, the dimwitted duo travel to Heaven, Hell and points in between as they meet (among others) Albert Einstein, the Easter Bunny and the Grim Reaper.

programme.title: Bill & Ted Face the Music
programme.desc: Yet to fulfill their rock and roll destiny, the stakes are higher than ever for the now middle-aged Bill and Ted who set out on a new adventure when a visitor from the future warns them that only their song can save life as we know it.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The competition takes its toll on one of the models as her insecurities cause her to burst into tears when she looks in the mirror.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Experts stress health and physical fitness with the models, and a nasty incident involving two of the girls and some baked goods leads to confrontation and a divided house.

programme.desc: The queens find themselves battling for laughs while impersonating their favorite celebrities on "RuPaul's Gaff-In" with Vicki Lawrence's "Mama", who is joined on the judge's panel by actress Busy Phillips.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars

programme.desc: An Apache's stealth in tandem with tomahawks, knives, war club, and bow and arrow go up against a killing machine Gladiator's spiked gloves, trident, sica, and armor.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The final remaining participants face the onslaught of Mongolia's brutal winter. Relentless hunger and savage cold test them like never before and in the end, only one will walk away with the $500,000 prize.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The participants from Season 5 return to discuss the trials and tribulations of surviving in Mongolia and how they coped with brutal, subzero temperatures, deadly predators, and punishing isolation as they pushed themselves to their limits.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: A quartet of bladesmiths are tasked with making canister damascus using barbershop tools, but before the knife making can begin, they must harvest their cans from an old barber's chair.

programme.title: Forged in Fire

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: In this special kung fu competition, four bladesmiths square off in the Forged in Fire dojo where they must make a matching set of three kunai throwing knives.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don looks toward his newly found religious beliefs to help him contend with an escaped criminal bent on revenge.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team has only four hours to stop a group of hijackers who take a bus full of Hollywood tourists hostage.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A feud between rival Chinese gangs leads to the kidnapping of an undercover agent and the re-appearance of the enigmatic Samuel Kraft.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A stolen pair of "kicks" leads the team into the world of sneaker collecting after a foreign Ambassador finds his prized pair missing.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When Robin's seemingly strong case against a weapons smuggler falls apart, the team decides to look into the jury who heard the case.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: To stop a new drug from hitting the streets, Charlie devises a plan that could put Liz in harm's way.

programme.title: Dexter: Original Sin
programme.desc: Young Dexter Morgan struggles to keep his urges in check while navigating life with his father, Harry, and sister, high-school senior Deb. After Harry has a health scare, Dexter realizes it may finally be time to fulfill his destiny. Series premiere.

programme.title: Dexter: Original Sin
programme.desc: Young Dexter Morgan struggles to keep his urges in check while navigating life with his father, Harry, and sister, high-school senior Deb. After Harry has a health scare, Dexter realizes it may finally be time to fulfill his destiny. Series premiere.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team members investigate when a man and his 18-year-old daughter mysteriously go missing. They suspect that the father's hazardous job as a professional crime-scene cleaner is somehow connected to the pair's disappearance.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a grieving woman and tries to determine whether or not she went missing while trying to rescue her son in Central America.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team members search for a woman who disappeared after the police killed her boyfriend. They wonder if the missing woman's brother, a drug dealer and violent gang leader, is connected to the abduction.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team members try to locate a woman who disappeared in the aftermath of an office shooting. They suspect that she went on the run in order to prevent a dark secret from being revealed.

programme.title: Dexter: Original Sin

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber (Liam Neeson) turns himself in, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

programme.title: Luv
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy gets a crash course in what it means to be a man when he spends a day with the ex-convict uncle he idolizes.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly
programme.desc: During the economic turmoil of 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), an enforcer, is hired to restore order after three idiots rob a mob-protected poker game.

programme.title: King of New York
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: Kill The Irishman
programme.desc: Oscar®-winner Christopher Walken, Val Kilmer, and Ray Stevenson star in KILL THE IRISHMAN, the true story of a tough Irish thug working for mobsters in Cleveland during the 1970s.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: Luv
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy gets a crash course in what it means to be a man when he spends a day with the ex-convict uncle he idolizes.

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: When Trish (Michele Michaels) decides to invite her high school girls' basketball teammates over for a slumber party, she has no idea the night is going to end with an unexpected guest.

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive
programme.desc: After a mysterious comet turns every machine on Earth into a homicidal rampage device, the survivors at the Dixie Boy Truck Stop are making a stand, and human vengeance goes into overdrive.

programme.title: Pet Sematary Two
programme.desc: Antagonized by the neighbourhood kids, Jeff befriends outsider, Drew Gilbert, who lives in fear of his cruel stepfather Gus. After Gus shoots Drew's beloved dog, the boys bury the body in a place rumoured to have powers of resurrection.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: Something is killing off townsfolk in Tarker's Mills. Something ingenious. Something remotely human. But the only person in town with courage to stop this lurking menace is a 13-year-old boy, confined to a wheelchair since birth.

programme.title: Stephen King's Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: When a mill is reopened, several employees meet their deaths. The killings all occur between 11 p.m. and 7 a.m. the Graveyard Shift. Soon, the workers find a maze of tunnels leading to the cemetery and the horror that comes alive at night.

programme.title: Stephen King's Thinner
programme.desc: An obese attorney accidentally runs down and kills an old gypsy woman. After her ancient father puts a curse on him, he starts losing weight, and cannot stop. Based on the Stephen King novel, written under the pseudonym Richard Bachman.

programme.title: Pet Sematary Two
programme.desc: Antagonized by the neighbourhood kids, Jeff befriends outsider, Drew Gilbert, who lives in fear of his cruel stepfather Gus. After Gus shoots Drew's beloved dog, the boys bury the body in a place rumoured to have powers of resurrection.

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
programme.desc: NEW HD TRANSFER. Everyone's favorite muck-encrusted plant-man falls in love with Dr. Arcane's sexy daughter and must rescue her from her father's nefarious and murderous plans.

programme.title: The Sea of Trees
programme.desc: After traveling to Japan's Aokigahara Forest, a troubled teacher (Matthew McConaughey) meets a mysterious stranger (Ken Watanabe) who takes him on a life-changing journey of love, discovery, and redemption.

programme.title: First Reformed
programme.desc: The pastor (Ethan Hawke) of a small church in upstate New York spirals out of control after a soul-shaking encounter with an unstable environmental activist and his pregnant wife (Amanda Seyfried) in this taut, chilling thriller.

programme.title: The Souvenir: Part II
programme.desc: A moving and vibrantly funny story of young adulthood and young love, The Souvenir Part II follows an ambitious film student in 1980s London through an intoxicating world of unpredictable and romantic entanglements.

programme.title: C'mon C'mon
programme.desc: Johnny and his young nephew forge a tenuous but transformational relationship when they are unexpectedly thrown together in this delicate and deeply moving story about the connections between adults and children, the past and the future.

programme.title: The Humans
programme.desc: Based on the Tony Award-winning play, a family gathers for Thanksgiving in their daughter's apartment. Amidst the warmth and humor of the holiday, the tight-knit family tries to hold together in the face of an anxious and uncertain future.

programme.title: The End of the Tour
programme.desc: A funny and touching exploration of fame, success, and friendship as we follow journalist David Lipsky (Jesse Eisenberg) during five days he spent on the road interviewing renowned and reclusive novelist David Foster Wallace (Jason Segel).

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: WarGames
programme.desc: The fate of mankind rests in the hands of a teenager (Matthew Broderick) who accidentally taps into the Defense Department's tactical computer. Dabney Coleman and Ally Sheedy co-star.

programme.title: Cutthroat Island
programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. "This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Alex Rider: Operation Stormbreaker
programme.desc: After his uncle dies, a young boy learns of his relative's true occupation as an undercover spy and is later recruited to be undercover himself. Based on the novel by Anthony Horowitz.

programme.title: Skyline
programme.desc: Jarrod and Elaine travel to Los Angeles to meet his friend Terry and his wife Candice. Terry gives a party in his apartment for Jarrod. The next morning, the group is awakened by beams of light. The group of friends try to escape from the alien invaders.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Rick shows viewers how three eateries translate super-fresh fish into beautifully balanced ceviches. In his Mexico City kitchen, Rick makes the case for classic ceviche.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Tamales, tamales. From iconic corn-husked versions at the casual Tamales Teresita, as well as the denser, banana-leaf-wrapped Chiapanecos style, sold by a family outside the historic San Juan Bautisa church.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: At the serene Roldan 37, Chef Romulo Mendoza prepares a perfect chile relleno. Then it is off to Pasilla de Humo and El Pescadito. To ensure at-home success, Rick provides in-depth details on the preparation of a classic: chiles rellenos.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati makes three classic Sonoran recipes, each one a meal in itself: a fish special called pescado zarandeado, a rich stew called gallina pinta, and a tasty dirty rice with clams. In Sonora, she visits vacation destination Puerto Peñasco.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: As Pati travels with her TV production crew through Mexico’s vast state of Sonora, she’s inspired by the bold flavors and ingredients. They stop at a hacienda outside of Hermosillo, where Pati prepares her take on a true Sonoran feast.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati is inspired by Sonora’s 'northern flavors' where the hot, arid desert lends itself to hearty and surprising recipes. She makes traditional tamales with corn, chiles, & cheese, and then for the main course, pork chops topped with pickled grape salad.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores the culinary highlights of Jalisco’s capital city, Guadalajara. She starts at a street cart to taste the city’s most iconic sandwich, tortas ahogadas. Then, she meets one of the city’s best chefs, Fabian Delgado.

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa are creating some of their favorite American dishes.

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa have a menu perfect for enjoying inside or out.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Billy Dec joins Ming in the kitchen to share some flavors from his roots in the Philippines. Billy cooks up a classic Adobo Pork Belly Bao with oozing Fried Egg, while Ming follows with a vegetarian version of an Apple Tofu Bao.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Chef Akhtar Nawab makes a hearty Mushroom Bolognese with homemade Ligurian Corzetti pasta, while Ming follows with Wok-Stirred Maitake Mushrooms atop a Scallion Noodle Cake. It's East meets West, meets Italy with these mushroom dishes.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ken Oringer joins Ming to work with a New England staple -- fresh oysters from off the shores of Massachusetts. Ken makes a mouthwatering Thai Sausage with Oyster Aioli and Ming rivals that with Butter Poached Oysters with Lapchong Salsa.

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: Marido en alquiler

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Mauricio ahogado por una gran tensión decide salir de la oficina y al toparse con Juana se sorprende. Juana al notar la sorpresa en Mauricio le pregunta si acaso no recuerda que ella asistía a su primer día de trabajo.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Juana no encuentra en Mauricio segundas intenciones. Sin malicia, Juana hace un comentario que llena de celos a David. Desireé los interrumpe.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Desireé aviva los celos en Carlota al decirle que Mauricio mantiene una aventura con “Sol”, ya que la contrató en la revista para mantenerla a su lado todos los días. Micky confiesa que fue cómplice de la trampa que le tendieron a Juana en el Colegio.

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Juana perdona a Micky por lo que hizo contra ella. Mauricio le confiesa a Desireé que hay una mujer que está esperando un hijo suyo pero teme que ella lo delate ante Carlota.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Suena la marcha nupcial y Sara entra a la iglesia para unirse a Cristóbal. La ceremonia se está realizando, cuando el primero en interrumpir la boda es el que al final es el más sorprendido. Los invitados son testigos de la fuerza del verdadero amor.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: A Marisa Luján no le tiemblan las piernas para entrar a la iglesia y develar frente a todos los secretos que Sara intenta mantener ocultos. Son muchas las voces que se suman a la de Marisa para poder desenmascarar todos los engaños de la novia.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal le suplica a Marisa que lo perdone, tratando de convencerla de rehacer sus vidas, dejando a un lado el orgullo y el dolor de sus heridas. Sara huye con su principal cómplice, mientras las unidades de la policía se activan en Queens.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Amelia reconoce cual es la mujer que tiene el empuje, el valor y el corazón necesarios para acompañar a su hijo. A Marisa le hará falta más que esa fortaleza para enfrentar la venganza que está planeando Sara. Cristóbal recibe una visita inesperada.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara Montero planifica más que un secuestro para lucirse con su maldad y ejecutar la peor tortura para Marisa. La sed de venganza de Estanislao toma el control de la situación, cuando llegan a un escondite en el que creen que no podrán ser encontrados.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa vive con angustia, a la espera de la llamada de los secuestradores para exigir sus condiciones. A pesar de seguir las coordenadas, la policía no se espera los planes de Estanislao. Pero aparece alguien con la clave para el rescate.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: No solo la policía llega al escondite de Sara Montiel, donde comienza un enfrentamiento feroz, y el rescate de Lalo se convierte en un duelo a muerte entre Calixta y el Polaco. El plan de Cristóbal no será suficiente para liberar al hijo de Marisa.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara, desesperada por acabar con su enemiga, tendrá el destino que jamás imaginó. El camino queda libre para llevar adelante los proyectos prometidos en la campaña del senador Parker y, en especial, el que unirá para siempre a Marisa y a Cristóbal.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, the Race travels to Monaco, where one team takes a big risk to gain an edge on the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When the race continues in Namibia, a flat tire deflates one team's hopes of leading the pack and the dreaded Double U-Turn returns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five teams race to Amsterdam and take a dip in a floating hot tub in search of their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As Racers soar high above the breathtaking Victoria Falls toward a double U-turn, Team Texas uses their express pass in the hopes of eliminating The Green Team.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: As Alicia works with Will on the appeal of a death row inmate, she agrees to a conjugal visit with Peter in order to get information from him since her client was convicted under Peter's regime as state's attorney.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: The teenage son of a former friend hires her to defend him in a murder case, Alicia makes a difficult journey back to her old life.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: As her husband's legal team continues to mount the case for his appeal, Alicia discovers evidence of possible jury tampering in her firm's class action law suit against a major pharmaceutical company.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: While representing the daughter of one of the partner's at the law firm, Alicia finds herself attracted to her co-counsel and his unorthodox approach to defending their client.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Peter needs Alicia to testify on his behalf as his appeals process begins sooner than expected. At the same time, she prepares to defend a scientist accused of arson.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia deals with tricky office politics when she's asked to represent the firm's senior partner after he's arrested. Meanwhile, Peter's evidentiary hearing hits the skids, leading Alicia to suspect that he may, in fact, actually be guilty of corruption.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family travel into the mountain gorillas' homeland, deep in the jungles of Rwanda's Volcanoes National Park. With only 700 of these great apes left in the wild, they learn first-hand what's being done to save the gentle giants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an adventure to the Loggerhead Marinelife Center in Juno Beach, Florida where conservationists are working to save endangered sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet creatures that couple up for keeps, like Magellanic penguins, West Africa’s Red River hogs, Chilean flamingos, golden lion tamarins and more. Love is in the air on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he travels to the remote Sukau River on the island of Borneo in Malaysia where he gets a seldom-seen look at pygmy elephants as they emerge from the rain forest.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi spend the day inside Tanzania's famed Ngorongoro Crater. The dormant volcano is home to hyena, lion, hippo, wildebeest, and loads of other creatures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads straight for the world-class Sepilok Orangutan Rehabilitation Centre that specializes in rehabilitating orphaned baby orangutans and releasing them back to their forest home.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he meets some animals that stockpile food and supplies. Check out the fascinating behaviors of Leaf-cutter Ants, Bears, Leopards, Honey Bees, Camels and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack on an amazing safari through Kenya's Masai Mara as he braves the rushing Mara River filled with Hippos and Nile Crocs. Then Jack explores wildlife after dark.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Check out just how wild a zoo can get. Come along with Jack as he visits some of the most innovative Zoos around the world and meets creatures like, Orangutans, Koalas, Sea Lions, Camels, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down six of nature’s spectacularly scary stories, like the toxic king cobra, the gargantuan griffon vulture, a cockroach-infested bat cave, a real-life dragon, and more wickedly wild creatures!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with the Hanna's as they visit two all-American Arizona zoos. They encounter Elephants, Big Horn Sheep, Rhino, Giant Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along for a biting and stinging countdown filled with some of the world’s most venomous creatures. Komodo Dragons, Diamondback Rattlesnakes, Jellyfish, Scorpions, and Stingrays!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Second Chances
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is meeting several lucky creatures that are getting a second chance at survival, with a little help from their friends. Gibbons, horses, sloths, and even a pigeon!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family search everywhere for chimpanzees in Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest. They get up close and personal with some colobus monkeys and Jack meets an old friend who is pioneering a conservation effort for the local women.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Bottoms Up
programme.desc: Jungle Jack goes to the ends of the Earth to meet nature's most captivating creatures! Today, adventures from the frigid waters of South America to elephant country in Africa and all the way up to Alaska's Glacier Bay.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Predators
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six ravenous encounters with mighty carnivores at the top of the food chain. Grizzly bears, Nile crocs, lions, African wild dogs, tiger sharks and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Ebb and Flow
programme.desc: Being an animal is thirsty work! Learn how water impacts the lives of elephants, hippos, caiman, giraffes and more! Six stories about the water supply in diverse ecosystems around the planet.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen depart Juneau, Alaska aboard the Wilderness Explorer in search of the endless natural beauty of Glacier Bay. Among their encounters: are bears, humpback whales, and glaciers. Jack also explores an old gold mine.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack for his favorite gorilla treks from Rwanda's Virunga Mountains. The Hanna's also visit veterinarians working with the wild gorillas, and a very special orphanage.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a step back into the past, and get a unique behind the scenes tour of the famous Hearst Castle in California. Stephen Hearst, the great grandson of William Randolph Hearst gives Jack the grand tour of the family ranch.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Gabon is home to some of the wildest beaches on the planet, and Pongara is no exception. Come along with Jack as he witnesses one of nature's most awe-inspiring feats -- one-ton Leatherback Sea Turtles returning to shore to lay their eggs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack and his grandson on safari to Tanzania's Selous Game Reserve, the largest reserve in Africa. They encounter territorial hippos, nesting crocodiles along with elephant, giraffe, impala and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down some of the weirdest, wackiest and wildest animal behaviors on the planet.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his grandson as they journey to the lush jungles of Lake Manyara National Park in Tanzania. They encounter an elephant roadblock, migrating pelicans, baboons, hippos, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for his all-time favorite animal adventures in the wild! The Great Migration, Mountain Gorillas, Elephants, Mandrills and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he enrolls his grandkids in zookeeper training at Arizona's Wildlife World Zoo! From training Sea Lions and bottle-feeding baby animals to encounters with Kangaroos, Lemurs, Warthogs, Ostrich, and more!

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger…the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques…to trace… a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.
